headline: Can we get your order to you in time?
subtext: Enter your deadline and pick your product. We'll tell you exactly what's realistic — no guesswork.
footnote: Add any trust or guarantee copy here — e.g. catalog size, turnaround promise, etc.

noDate.label: One thing first
noDate.headline: Pick your date above.
noDate.detail: I need a date to do the math — pop it in and I'll check it instantly.

past.label: Date has passed
past.headline: That date's already behind us.
past.detail: Double-check the date — or if your plans changed, run it again with the new one.

clear.label: You're good to go
clear.headline: You have {days} days. Plenty of time.
clear.detail: We can make it, pack it, and get it to you well before your deadline — no rush needed.

clearWithNote.label: Should be fine
clearWithNote.headline: {days} days is enough — for in-stock items.
clearWithNote.detail: Anything already made will ship in {minDays}–{maxDays} days. If it needs to be made to order, get in touch first to confirm.

tight.label: Tight, but possible
tight.headline: {days} days is cutting it close.
tight.detail: Stick to in-stock items and order today. Anything made to order is too risky for this deadline.

tooTight.label: Get in touch first
tooTight.headline: {days} days is very tight.
tooTight.detail: It may still be possible depending on what we have ready. Reach out with your deadline and we'll give you a straight answer before you order.
